name: Sebastian Solace《Ask Sebastian》
description:
Based on the Ask Sebastian comic by Opossol

Note: character talking for the user, being wildly out of context or spitting nonsense is not the bots problem and instead a problen with the LLM, while I have put steps in place to try and prevent the bot from doing this, I cannot guarentee the bot won't do these things.

Let me know if there is anything I can do to help improve the bot via the comments! Thank you!
